title: MVanilla
description: MeadVanilla or MVanilla is a modpack to enhance your experience with the game.
body:
MeadVanilla or MVanilla is a modpack to enhance your experience with the game.

This modpack is inspired on Vanilla Perfected by demonjoeTV. I added more features, like the Trash Slot and removed some content to improve the performance and mainly make it playable in old hardwares! I mainly made this modpack to be a more lite version of Vanilla Perfected, without major changes to the game. I also added a Festive Resource Pack if you want to get into the christmas spirit as I love this pack!

I recommend aswell, making a [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) pack for QoL purposes.

Enjoy!
